DescribeCacheNodes.filters: Filter conditions (see Appendix: Filter). Multiple filters are combined with AND logic; multiple values within a filter use OR logic. Supported fields: * name=cacheNodeId, e.g. value=["wn-LVWFONLJei7W-DFfmSUFht1zt", "wn-LVWFONLJei7W-CKVxoBV6soGW"]; * name=ip, e.g. value=["192.168.0.1", "192.168.0.2"]; * name=zone, e.g. value=["zoneA", "zoneB"]; * name=status, see CacheNodeStatus for valid enum values, e.g. value=["RUNNING","ADDING"]; * name=cacheDeployGroupName, only supported when cache access type is K8S/CCE/AIHC, e.g. value=["test-cache-deploy-group", "test-cdp"]
DescribeCacheNodes.filters.name: The field to filter on. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic. Example: zone
DescribeCacheNodes.filters.values: The filter values for the field. Multiple values use OR logic. Example: ["zoneA", "zoneB"]
DescribeCacheNodes.maxKeys: Maximum number of items to return. Valid range: [1, 1000]. Default: 100
DescribeCacheNodes.marker: Starting position for paginated list retrieval. The returned list is sorted by cacheNodeId in lexicographic order. Set this to the nextMarker value from the previous response
